emails.subject: Re: FW: PLEASE READ
emails.body: Re: FW: PLEASE READ Please be advised that the company's trading policy prohibits any Enron=20 employee from trading any products that the company trades. =09Roger Gahunia/ENRON@enronXgate =0906/05/2001 10:04 PM =09=09=20 =09=09
